contract: Every default native installer artifact must have an install, verify, upgrade-or-reinstall, and uninstall smoke path before release upload.

lifecycle.upgrade: rerun the same setup.exe silently over the installed copy
lifecycle.uninstall: run generated unins*.exe silently and verify row.exe is removed
msiexec /x <artifact> /qn /norestart and verify row.exe is removed

lifecycle.install: hdiutil attach read-only DMG and copy Remote Ops Workspace.app into a smoke Applications directory
lifecycle.verify: codesign --verify --deep --strict on the copied app bundle
lifecycle.upgrade: replace the copied app bundle from the mounted DMG
lifecycle.uninstall: remove the copied app bundle and detach the DMG

lifecycle.verify: installed /Applications/Remote Ops Workspace.app exists and passes codesign verification
lifecycle.upgrade: sudo installer -pkg <artifact> -target / over the installed package
lifecycle.uninstall: remove /Applications/Remote Ops Workspace.app and forget the package receipt

lifecycle.upgrade: sudo dpkg -i <artifact> over the installed package
lifecycle.uninstall: sudo dpkg -r remote-ops-workspace and verify /usr/bin/row is removed

lifecycle.upgrade: sudo rpm -Uvh --replacepkgs <artifact> over the installed package
lifecycle.uninstall: sudo rpm -e remote-ops-workspace and verify /usr/bin/row is removed

lifecycle.upgrade: overwrite the staged AppImage with the same artifact and run --version again
